title: Missing Ownership Validation in Order Cancellation
description: `CancelContext.validateBalance()` only checks for the existence of the order and does not verify that the order belongs to the provided L1Owner. There is no subsequent ownership enforcement in `dispatcher.handleCancelRequest` or `engine.CancelOrder`, so any account can cancel another user's order by supplying its orderId.
recommendation: Fetch the order by ID and verify order.UserID matches L1Owner before returning success.
